description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a symmetrical design, featuring two large, dark metallic blades extending from either side of a central metallic head. The blades are broad and slightly curved, with a cutout pattern near the center, giving the axe a distinctive and aggressive appearance. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood with a reddish-brown hue, reinforced with metallic bands and a textured grip section near the base. The central head of the axe is metallic and robust, connecting the blades securely to the handle. The overall construction suggests durability and strength, suitable for heavy-duty use. The axe has a medieval or fantasy aesthetic, making it visually striking and functional.
description: A double-headed battle axe with broad, dark metallic blades and a long, reinforced wooden handle. The design is robust, symmetrical, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, curved blades and the full width of the axe head.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both blades and the central head visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and handle.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight cylindrical wooden handle with a textured grip and metallic reinforcement bands.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, broad, curved steel blades with central cutouts and symmetrical geometry.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and banded mounting with visible metallic reinforcement.
